description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set on a spacious, landscaped lot with a mix of small trees and shrubs. The building features a light-colored facade with multiple gabled roof sections in a darker shade, and a prominent attached garage on one side. The front of the bungalow is defined by a symmetrical arrangement of windows and a central entrance, while the rear includes a patio area with outdoor furniture. The property is bordered by a line of trees and a paved driveway leads up to the garage. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor space and orderly landscaping. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, wood, and glass, with a shingled roof.
description: A large, modern bungalow with a gabled roof, attached garage, and landscaped lot featuring trees and a paved driveway. The facade is light-colored with symmetrical windows and a central entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, attached garage, and landscaped front yard with a row of trees along the street.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and the side yard with scattered trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor furniture, and the back facade with additional windows and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, rear patio, and the continuation of the driveway and tree line.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
